activities.title: Check-in
activities.description: Arrive at hotel and settle in.

activities.title: Eiffel Tower
activities.description: Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower. Take the elevator to the top for panoramic views of Paris.

activities.title: Seine River Cruise
activities.description: Relaxing boat tour along the Seine with views of major landmarks.

activities.title: Dinner in Le Marais
activities.description: Enjoy traditional French cuisine at a bistro in the historic Le Marais district.

activities.title: Louvre Museum
activities.description: Explore world-famous art including the Mona Lisa and Venus de Milo.

activities.title: Musée d'Orsay
activities.description: Admire Impressionist masterpieces in this former railway station.

activities.title: Montmartre Walk
activities.description: Wander through the artistic neighborhood of Montmartre, visit Place du Tertre.

activities.title: Sacré-Cœur
activities.description: Visit the basilica and enjoy sunset views over Paris.

activities.title: Notre-Dame Cathedral
activities.description: Marvel at Gothic architecture of this iconic cathedral.

activities.title: Luxembourg Gardens
activities.description: Stroll through beautiful gardens and visit the Medicis Fountain.

activities.title: Latin Quarter Lunch
activities.description: Enjoy lunch in this lively student district.

activities.title: Shopping at Galeries Lafayette
activities.description: Browse luxury goods and enjoy the stunning dome.

activities.title: Departure
activities.description: Head to the airport for your flight home.

hotels.name: Hotel de Paris
hotels.description: Beautiful hotel near the city center with stunning views of the Eiffel Tower.

hotels.name: Le Grand Monarque
hotels.description: Elegant hotel in the 7th arrondissement, close to major museums.

hotels.name: Boutique Montmartre
hotels.description: Charming boutique hotel in the artistic Montmartre district.
